class.name: ConPtyProcess
class.brief_description: Windows ConPTY process wrapper for terminal emulation.
class.description: Manages a pseudo-console (ConPTY) child process on Windows, providing read/write access to the process's terminal I/O. Used internally by the Claude terminal dock.

method.name: start
method.description: Starts a new pseudo-console process with the given command and terminal size. Returns [constant OK] on success.

method.name: stop
method.description: Stops the child process and cleans up resources.

method.name: is_running
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the child process is still running.

method.name: write_input
method.description: Writes bytes to the child process's stdin.

method.name: drain_output
method.description: Returns and clears all pending output from the child process.

method.name: resize
method.description: Resizes the pseudo-console. Returns [constant OK] on success.

method.name: get_cols
method.description: Returns the terminal width in columns.

method.name: get_rows
method.description: Returns the terminal height in rows.
